message:
fix: prevent division by zero and panic with invalid sampleSize

- Add input validation to clamp sampleSize to minimum of 1
- Prevents division by zero when sampleSize=0 passed
- Prevents panic from negative slice index when sampleSize<0 passed
- Add test cases for zero and negative sampleSize edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
